data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Walk-up QR booking (scan to see availability and book on spot)', but the evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature, but there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that the system can perform walk-up QR bookings. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence provided to satisfy the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of walk-up QR booking functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the walk-up QR booking requirement.
